Service & Recon Workflow

Workflows that update themselves.

Most workflow software depends on someone remembering to update it. MDD's doesn't. Because we know where the car physically is, the system updates automatically.

See LocateIQ in Action → Why It's Different
The problem

Your workflow dashboard looks organized. But is it accurate?

Service Bottlenecks

Cars sit in bays longer than they should because nobody logged the status change.

Recon Delays

Used cars sit for days longer than necessary because steps get missed in the system.

Manual Updates

Someone has to remember to log that a car left the bay. They often don't.

Hidden Costs

Outside auditors. Disjointed software. Frustrated technicians. Inaccuracy compounds fast.

The MDD difference

LocateIQ — automation powered by real vehicle location.

Because we track the physical position of every car and key, MDD can automatically advance your workflow when vehicles move. No manual updates. No stale dashboards.

Other Workflow Tools

  • Rely on manual status updates
  • Data is only as good as the last person
  • Bottlenecks discovered too late
  • No physical location intelligence
VS

MDD + LocateIQ

  • Workflows advance automatically when cars move
  • Real-time accuracy without extra work
  • Instant bottleneck alerts
  • Powered by physical vehicle location
Desktop Dashboard

Full visibility from your desk.

See every vehicle in process, cycle times, bottleneck alerts, and team performance — all in one real-time dashboard. Filter by workflow stage, technician, or time in process.
